fault_analysis: The white SUV appears to have failed to yield at the intersection, crossing the centre line before the impact occurred. The dashcam vehicle was travelling at a lawful speed with right of way.
timeline: Pre-incident: vehicles approaching at normal traffic speed, road clear.

prose_report: On 27 March 2026, a traffic incident was recorded by the onboard dashcam unit. The footage depicts a moderate collision involving a car and a SUV at an intersection under clear conditions. The SUV failed to yield right-of-way, crossing the central divider prior to impact. Road surfaces were dry asphalt. Visibility was assessed as good. Based on the sequence of events captured, the SUV operator bears primary responsibility for the incident.
